2026-04-24T02:03:07.1572211Z 
2026-04-24T02:03:07.1572353Z To resolve this, try the following:
2026-04-24T02:03:07.1573249Z   • Start 'copilot' and run the '/login' command to re-authenticate
2026-04-24T02:03:07.1574452Z   • If using a Fine-Grained PAT, ensure it has the 'Copilot Requests' permission enabled
2026-04-24T02:03:07.1575581Z   • If using COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN, GH_TOKEN or GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable, verify the token is valid and not expired
2026-04-24T02:03:07.1576971Z   • Run 'gh auth status' to check your current authentication status

2026-04-24T02:03:13.1650878Z Error: No authentication information found.
2026-04-24T02:03:13.1651324Z 
2026-04-24T02:03:13.1651789Z Copilot can be authenticated with GitHub using an OAuth Token or a Fine-Grained Personal Access Token.
2026-04-24T02:03:13.1652224Z 
2026-04-24T02:03:13.1652694Z To authenticate, you can use any of the following methods:
2026-04-24T02:03:13.1653323Z   • Start 'copilot' and run the '/login' command
2026-04-24T02:03:13.1653989Z   • Set the COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN, GH_TOKEN, or GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable
2026-04-24T02:03:13.1654500Z   • Run 'gh auth login' to authenticate with the GitHub CLI
